description_long: This object is a rectangular box of Winchester 9mm Luger ammunition, featuring a white cardboard exterior with red and black printed text and branding. The box is partially open, revealing a black plastic tray inside that holds multiple rows of shiny brass-colored cartridges. The top of the box displays the Winchester logo, caliber information, and other product details, while the sides provide additional specifications and manufacturer information. The cartridges are neatly arranged in the tray, with their rounded tips visible and the metallic casings reflecting light. The overall appearance is clean and organized, with the packaging designed for both protection and easy access to the ammunition. The box is compact and portable, suitable for storage or transport in an urban environment.
description: A white Winchester-branded box containing neatly arranged brass 9mm cartridges in a black plastic tray, partially open to display the ammunition. The packaging is compact, with clear labeling and a professional finish.
description_view_0: The side view shows the open box with the black tray and several rows of brass cartridges visible, along with the Winchester branding and product details on the box.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the full grid of brass cartridges in the black tray, with the Winchester logo and product information clearly visible on the box lid.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the cartridges and tray from the other side, with more of the box's side text and branding visible.
description_view_3: The front view focuses on the end of the box, showing the Winchester logo, caliber, and grain information, with the tops of the cartridges just visible inside.
attribute_label_text: WINCHESTER 9mm LUGER 115 GRAIN FULL METAL JACKET
attribute_brand_logo: stylized horse and rider in black
